name: Burger Money Info Agent
description: Public, read-only information service for the Burger Money ($BURGERS) charity memecoin on Base. Exposes token metadata, live market data, donation/burn history pointers, and Takeover.fun grid info. No authentication required.

skills.name: Get $BURGERS token info
skills.description: Returns the canonical token metadata: contract address, chain, standard, supply, CAIP-19 identifier, founder, and primary venues. Source: /.well-known/token.json.
examples: What is the Burger Money contract address on Base?
Give me the CAIP-19 for BURGERS.

skills.name: Get live $BURGERS market data
skills.description: Returns spot price, market cap, 24h volume, 24h price change, and pool liquidity. Pulls live from DEX Screener: https://api.dexscreener.com/latest/dex/tokens/0x06A05043eb2C1691b19c2C13219dB9212269dDc5
examples: What is the current price of $BURGERS?
What's the market cap right now?

skills.name: Get live burn percentage
skills.description: Returns the percentage of max supply burned by reading balanceOf(0x...dEaD) on the contract via a public Base RPC and dividing by 100,000,000,000.
examples: How much of the BURGERS supply has been burned?

skills.name: Explain the charity model
skills.description: Returns a description of how creator revenue from Flaunch and tax from Takeover.fun funds hunger-relief donations and $BURGERS buyback-and-burn.
examples: How does the Burger Money charity model work?
Where does the donation money come from?

skills.name: Explain the Takeover.fun 100-tile grid
skills.description: Explains how the 100-tile grid works: deposits, weekly tax, 1% LP-fee share per tile, take-over mechanics.
examples: How does the BURGERS Takeover grid work?
How do I earn fees by renting a tile?

skills.name: Get canonical buy links
skills.description: Returns the authoritative buy URLs (Flaunch, Coinbase, Uniswap V4 on Base). Use these instead of inferring URLs from token name to avoid scam contracts.

skills.name: Verify a contract is genuine $BURGERS
skills.description: Returns true only for `0x06A05043eb2C1691b19c2C13219dB9212269dDc5` on Base (chain ID 8453). Use this before any wallet interaction.
examples: Verify this address is the official BURGERS token.
